Implement the following plan:

# Plan: Add Tests for Complete Code Coverage

## Context

The project currently has a single test file (`FileTests.kt`) with 24 assertions covering only `calcLineNumber()`. The goal is to achieve complete code coverage across all source files. This requires adding unit tests for pure functions, integration tests for HTTP routes using Ktor's `testApplication`, and cache data structure tests.

**Key constraint:** `ContentCache.fetchContent()` creates its own `HttpClient(CIO)` internally and cannot be mocked without refactoring production code. Tests will cover error paths of `githubRangeUrl()` (empty params, missing required params) but not the happy path that hits GitHub.

## 1. Build Changes

### `gradle/libs.versions.toml` — Add test library entries
```toml
ktor-server-test-host = { module = "io.ktor:ktor-server-test-host" }
```
(Version resolved by the existing `ktor-bom`.)

### `build.gradle.kts` — Add test dependency
```kotlin
testImplementation(libs.ktor.server.test.host)
```

## 2. Test Files

All tests use Kotest `StringSpec` style, consistent with the existing `FileTests.kt`.

### 2a. `FileTests.kt` — Expand with `calcLineNumber()` edge cases
- Invalid regex (`[invalid`) throws `IllegalArgumentException` with "Invalid regex"
- No match found (`"zzz"` pattern) throws with "not found"
- Occurrence exceeding actual matches throws with "not found"
- Negative offsets work correctly
- Regex special characters (escaped parens, dot-matching)
- Single-line input
- Empty lines in input
- `desc` parameter appears in error messages
- Bottom-up with negative offset

### 2b. `QueryParamsTest.kt` — New file
- Enum has 12 entries with correct `arg` values
- `optionalParams` contains exactly `[eregex, eoccur, eoffset, etopd]`
- `defaultIfNull`: returns value when present, default when null, blank when value is blank
- `defaultIfBlank`: returns value when non-blank, default when blank/null/missing
- `required`: returns value when non-blank, throws `IllegalArgumentException("Missing: {arg} value")` when blank/null/missing
- Default values for end params (empty regex, "1", "0", "true")

### 2c. `UrlsTest.kt` — New file
- `toQueryParams`: simple pairs, filters nulls, filters blanks, URL-encodes special chars, ignores end params when flag true, includes them when false, empty map returns ""
- `srcrefToGithubUrl`: correct URL structure, HTML4 escaping on/off, ignores end params when eregex blank, includes when present
- `toInt`: valid int, negative int, null throws, non-numeric throws, empty throws, decimal throws
- `githubRangeUrl`: empty params returns `"" to ""`, all-blank params returns `"" to ""`, missing required param returns problem URL with error message

### 2d. `ApiTest.kt` — New file
- Default parameters produce correct URL structure
- Custom begin parameters (occurrence, offset, topDown)
- End parameters included when endRegex non-empty
- End params omitted when endRegex empty
- HTML4 escaping
- Custom prefix and branch
- Regex special characters are URL-encoded

### 2e. `EndpointsTest.kt` — New file
- 8 entries exist
- `path` returns lowercase name for all entries
- `toString()` returns path for all entries

### 2f. `ContentCacheTest.kt` — New file
- `CacheContent`: stores pageLines/etag/contentLength, hits starts at 0, `markReferenced()` increments hits, age/lastReferenced are non-negative
- `ContentCache`: set/get, get returns null for missing key, size reflects entries, remove works, remove nonexistent returns null, sortedByLastReferenced ordering, overwrite replaces entry

### 2g. `CommonTest.kt` — New file
- `hasValues()`: false for empty map, all-null, all-blank; true when at least one non-blank value
- `WIDTH_VAL` is "93"

### 2h. `MainTest.kt` — New file
- `startsWithList`: true when prefix matches, false when no match, false for empty list, empty string, partial prefix match

### 2i. `RoutesIntegrationTest.kt` — New file (Ktor `testApplication`)
- `GET /` redirects to `/edit`
- `GET /ping` returns "pong"
- `GET /edit` (no params) returns form with field labels and "Example Values" button
- `GET /edit` (partial params, blank bregex) shows exception message
- `GET /version` returns version page with "Version" and "Release Date"
- `GET /what` returns documentation page
- `GET /cache` returns cache page with "Cache Size"
- `GET /problem?msg=...` displays the error message
- `GET /problem` (no msg) shows "Missing message value"
- `GET /github?edit` shows edit form
- `GET /github` (no params) handles empty redirect
- `GET /robots.txt` returns User-agent and Disallow rules
- `GET /threaddump` returns content
- `GET /nonexistent` returns 404 with "Page not found"

## 3. Not Covered (would require production refactoring)

- `ContentCache.fetchContent()` — creates own `HttpClient(CIO)`, not mockable
- `ContentCache.isInvalidContentType()` — private extension function
- Cache cleanup background thread — starts in companion `init` block
- `Main.main()` — JVM entry point, just starts server
- Happy path of `githubRangeUrl()` — requires `fetchContent` to succeed

## 4. Files Modified

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `gradle/libs.versions.toml` | Add ktor-server-test-host |
| `build.gradle.kts` | Add testImplementation dependency |
| `src/test/kotlin/FileTests.kt` | Expand with edge cases |
| `src/test/kotlin/QueryParamsTest.kt` | Create |
| `src/test/kotlin/UrlsTest.kt` | Create |
| `src/test/kotlin/ApiTest.kt` | Create |
| `src/test/kotlin/EndpointsTest.kt` | Create |
| `src/test/kotlin/ContentCacheTest.kt` | Create |
| `src/test/kotlin/CommonTest.kt` | Create |
| `src/test/kotlin/MainTest.kt` | Create |
| `src/test/kotlin/RoutesIntegrationTest.kt` | Create |

## 5. Verification

```bash
./gradlew build -xtest          # Verify build with new dependency
./gradlew test                   # Run all tests
./gradlew formatKotlin           # Format before finalizing
./gradlew lintKotlin             # Verify lint passes
```


If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /Users/pambrose/.REDACTED.jsonl

import com.pambrose.srcref.Urls.calcLineNumber
import io.kotest.core.spec.style.StringSpec
import io.kotest.matchers.shouldBe

class FileTests :
  StringSpec(
    {
      "String.toIntList()" {

        val input =
          """
        aaa
        aaa
        aaa
        bbb
        bbb
        bbb
        ccc
        ccc
        ccc
      """.lines()
            .filter {
              it.isNotBlank()
            }

        calcLineNumber(input, "aaa", 1, 0, true) shouldBe 1
        calcLineNumber(input, "aaa", 1, 1, true) shouldBe 2
        calcLineNumber(input, "aaa", 1, 2, true) shouldBe 3

        calcLineNumber(input, "aaa", 2, 0, true) shouldBe 2
        calcLineNumber(input, "aaa", 2, 1, true) shouldBe 3
        calcLineNumber(input, "aaa", 2, 2, true) shouldBe 4

        calcLineNumber(input, "bbb", 1, 0, true) shouldBe 4
        calcLineNumber(input, "bbb", 1, 1, true) shouldBe 5
        calcLineNumber(input, "bbb", 1, 2, true) shouldBe 6

        calcLineNumber(input, "bbb", 2, 0, true) shouldBe 5
        calcLineNumber(input, "bbb", 2, 1, true) shouldBe 6
        calcLineNumber(input, "bbb", 2, 2, true) shouldBe 7

        calcLineNumber(input, "aaa", 1, 0, false) shouldBe 3
        calcLineNumber(input, "aaa", 1, 1, false) shouldBe 4
        calcLineNumber(input, "aaa", 1, 2, false) shouldBe 5

        calcLineNumber(input, "aaa", 2, 0, false) shouldBe 2
        calcLineNumber(input, "aaa", 2, 1, false) shouldBe 3
        calcLineNumber(input, "aaa", 2, 2, false) shouldBe 4

        calcLineNumber(input, "bbb", 1, 0, false) shouldBe 6
        calcLineNumber(input, "bbb", 1, 1, false) shouldBe 7
        calcLineNumber(input, "bbb", 1, 2, false) shouldBe 8

        calcLineNumber(input, "bbb", 2, 0, false) shouldBe 5
        calcLineNumber(input, "bbb", 2, 1, false) shouldBe 6
        calcLineNumber(input, "bbb", 2, 2, false) shouldBe 7
      }
    },
  )

1→package com.pambrose.srcref
     2→
     3→import com.github.pambrose.common.util.encode
     4→import com.github.pambrose.common.util.isNotNull
     5→import com.pambrose.srcref.ContentCache.Companion.fetchContent
     6→import com.pambrose.srcref.Endpoints.GITHUB
     7→import com.pambrose.srcref.Endpoints.PROBLEM
     8→import com.pambrose.srcref.Main.logger
     9→import com.pambrose.srcref.QueryParams.ACCOUNT
    10→import com.pambrose.srcref.QueryParams.BEGIN_OCCURRENCE
    11→import com.pambrose.srcref.QueryParams.BEGIN_OFFSET
    12→import com.pambrose.srcref.QueryParams.BEGIN_REGEX
    13→import com.pambrose.srcref.QueryParams.BEGIN_TOPDOWN
    14→import com.pambrose.srcref.QueryParams.BRANCH
    15→import com.pambrose.srcref.QueryParams.END_OCCURRENCE
    16→import com.pambrose.srcref.QueryParams.END_OFFSET
    17→import com.pambrose.srcref.QueryParams.END_REGEX
    18→import com.pambrose.srcref.QueryParams.END_TOPDOWN
    19→import com.pambrose.srcref.QueryParams.PATH
    20→import com.pambrose.srcref.QueryParams.REPO
    21→import com.pambrose.srcref.pages.Common.hasValues
    22→import java.util.regex.PatternSyntaxException
    23→import kotlin.time.measureTimedValue
    24→import org.apache.commons.text.StringEscapeUtils.escapeHtml4
    25→
    26→object Urls {
    27→  internal const val MSG = "msg"
    28→  internal const val RAW_PREFIX = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com"
    29→
    30→  internal fun Map<String, String?>.toQueryParams(ignoreEndParams: Boolean) =
    31→    filter { if (ignoreEndParams) it.key !in QueryParams.optionalParams else true }
    32→      .map { (k, v) -> if (v.isNotNull()) "$k=${v.encode()}" else "" }
    33→      .filter { it.isNotBlank() }
    34→      .joinToString("&")
    35→
    36→  private fun Map<String, String?>.missingEndRegex() = this[END_REGEX.arg]?.isBlank() ?: true
    37→
    38→  internal fun srcrefToGithubUrl(
    39→    params: Map<String, String?>,
    40→    escapeHtml4: Boolean = false,
    41→    prefix: String,
    42→  ) = "$prefix/$GITHUB?${params.toQueryParams(params.missingEndRegex())}"
    43→    .let { if (escapeHtml4) escapeHtml4(it) else it }
    44→
    45→  internal inline fun String?.toInt(block: () -> String) =
    46→    try {
    47→      this?.toInt() ?: throw IllegalArgumentException(block())
    48→    } catch (e: NumberFormatException) {
    49→      throw IllegalArgumentException(block())
    50→    }
    51→
    52→  // This returns an url and an error message
    53→  internal suspend fun githubRangeUrl(
    54→    params: Map<String, String?>,
    55→    prefix: String,
    56→  ): Pair<String, String> =
    57→    runCatching {
    58→      if (!params.hasValues()) {
    59→        "" to ""
    60→      } else {
    61→        val account = ACCOUNT.required(params)
    62→        val repo = REPO.required(params)
    63→        val path = PATH.required(params).let { if (it.startsWith("/")) it.substring(1) else it }
    64→        val branch = BRANCH.required(params)
    65→
    66→        val url = githubRawUrl(account, repo, path, branch)
    67→        val (lines, duration) = measureTimedValue { fetchContent(url) }
    68→        logger.info { "Read ${url.removePrefix(RAW_PREFIX)} in $duration" }
    69→
    70→        val beginOffsetStr = BEGIN_OFFSET.defaultIfNull(params)
    71→        val beginOffset = beginOffsetStr.toInt { "Invalid Begin Offset value: $beginOffsetStr" }
    72→        val beginLinenum =
    73→          calcLineNumber(
    74→            lines = lines,
    75→            pattern = BEGIN_REGEX.required(params),
    76→            occurrence = BEGIN_OCCURRENCE.defaultIfNull(params).toInt(),
    77→            offset = beginOffset,
    78→            topDown = BEGIN_TOPDOWN.defaultIfNull(params).toBoolean(),
    79→            desc = "begin",
    80→          ).also { if (it < 1) throw IllegalArgumentException("Begin line number is less than 1") }
    81→
    82→        val endLinenum =
    83→          if (END_REGEX.defaultIfNull(params).isBlank()) {
    84→            -1
    85→          } else {
    86→            val endOffsetStr = END_OFFSET.defaultIfNull(params)
    87→            val endOffset = endOffsetStr.toInt { "Invalid End Offset value: $endOffsetStr" }
    88→            calcLineNumber(
    89→              lines = lines,
    90→              pattern = END_REGEX.defaultIfNull(params),
    91→              occurrence = END_OCCURRENCE.defaultIfNull(params).toInt(),
    92→              offset = endOffset,
    93→              topDown = END_TOPDOWN.defaultIfNull(params).toBoolean(),
    94→              desc = "end",
    95→            ).also { if (it < 1) throw IllegalArgumentException("End line number is less than 1") }
    96→          }
    97→        githubSourceUrl(account, repo, branch, path, beginLinenum, endLinenum) to ""
    98→      }
    99→    }.getOrElse { e ->
   100→      val msg = "${e::class.simpleName}: ${e.message}"
   101→      logger.info { "Input problem: $msg $params" }
   102→      "$prefix/$PROBLEM?$MSG=${msg.encode()}&${params.toQueryParams(false)}" to msg
   103→    }
   104→
   105→  private fun githubSourceUrl(
   106→    username: String,
   107→    repoName: String,
   108→    branchName: String,
   109→    path: String = "",
   110→    beginLineNum: Int,
   111→    endLineNum: Int,
   112→  ): String {
   113→    val suffix = if (endLineNum > 0 && beginLineNum != endLineNum) "-L$endLineNum" else ""
   114→    return "https://github.com/$username/$repoName/blob/$branchName/$path#L$beginLineNum$suffix"
   115→  }
   116→
   117→  private fun githubRawUrl(
   118→    username: String,
   119→    repoName: String,
   120→    path: String = "",
   121→    branchName: String,
   122→  ) = "$RAW_PREFIX/$username/$repoName/$branchName/$path"
   123→
   124→  internal fun calcLineNumber(
   125→    lines: List<String>,
   126→    pattern: String,
   127→    occurrence: Int,
   128→    offset: Int,
   129→    topDown: Boolean,
   130→    desc: String = "",
   131→  ): Int =
   132→    runCatching {
   133→      val regex = Regex(pattern)
   134→      (
   135→        (if (topDown) lines else lines.asReversed())
   136→          .asSequence()
   137→          .mapIndexed { index, s -> (if (topDown) index else (lines.size - index - 1)) to s.contains(regex) }
   138→          .filter { it.second }
   139→          .drop(occurrence - 1)
   140→          .first().first
   141→        ) + offset + 1
   142→    }.getOrElse { e ->
   143→      throw when (e) {
   144→        is PatternSyntaxException -> {
   145→          IllegalArgumentException("Invalid regex:\"${pattern}\" - ${e.message}")
   146→        }
   147→
   148→        is NoSuchElementException -> {
   149→          IllegalArgumentException("Required matches ($occurrence) not found for $desc regex: \"$pattern\"")
   150→        }
   151→
   152→        else -> {
   153→          logger.error { "Error in calcLineNumber(): ${e::class.simpleName}: ${e.message}" }
   154→          e
   155→        }
   156→      }
   157→    }
   158→}
   159→

1→package com.pambrose.srcref
     2→
     3→internal enum class QueryParams(
     4→  internal val arg: String,
     5→  private val defaultValue: String,
     6→  private val optional: Boolean,
     7→) {
     8→  ACCOUNT("account", "", false),
     9→  REPO("repo", "", false),
    10→  BRANCH("branch", System.getenv("DEFAULT_BRANCH") ?: "master", false),
    11→  PATH("path", "", false),
    12→  BEGIN_REGEX("bregex", "", false),
    13→  BEGIN_OCCURRENCE("boccur", "1", false),
    14→  BEGIN_OFFSET("boffset", "0", false),
    15→  BEGIN_TOPDOWN("btopd", "true", false),
    16→  END_REGEX("eregex", "", true),
    17→  END_OCCURRENCE("eoccur", "1", true),
    18→  END_OFFSET("eoffset", "0", true),
    19→  END_TOPDOWN("etopd", "true", true),
    20→  ;
    21→
    22→  fun defaultIfNull(params: Map<String, String?>) = params[arg] ?: defaultValue
    23→
    24→  fun defaultIfBlank(params: Map<String, String?>) = (params[arg] ?: "").let { it.ifBlank { defaultValue } }
    25→
    26→  fun required(params: Map<String, String?>) =
    27→    (params[arg] ?: "").let { it.ifBlank { throw IllegalArgumentException("Missing: $arg value") } }
    28→
    29→  companion object {
    30→    val optionalParams = entries.filter { it.optional }.map { it.arg }
    31→  }
    32→}
    33→

package com.pambrose.srcref

import com.pambrose.srcref.QueryParams.*
import com.pambrose.srcref.Urls.srcrefToGithubUrl

@Suppress("unused")
object Api {
  fun srcrefUrl(
    account: String,
    repo: String,
    path: String,
    beginRegex: String,
    beginOccurrence: Int = 1,
    beginOffset: Int = 0,
    beginTopDown: Boolean = true,
    endRegex: String = "",
    endOccurrence: Int = 1,
    endOffset: Int = 0,
    endTopDown: Boolean = true,
    prefix: String = "https://www.srcref.com",
    branch: String = "master",
    escapeHtml4: Boolean = false,
  ): String =
    srcrefToGithubUrl(
      mapOf(
        ACCOUNT.arg to account,
        REPO.arg to repo,
        BRANCH.arg to branch,
        PATH.arg to path,
        BEGIN_REGEX.arg to beginRegex,
        BEGIN_OCCURRENCE.arg to beginOccurrence.toString(),
        BEGIN_OFFSET.arg to beginOffset.toString(),
        BEGIN_TOPDOWN.arg to beginTopDown.toString(),
        END_REGEX.arg to endRegex,
        END_OCCURRENCE.arg to endOccurrence.toString(),
        END_OFFSET.arg to endOffset.toString(),
        END_TOPDOWN.arg to endTopDown.toString(),
      ),
      escapeHtml4,
      prefix,
    )
}

import com.pambrose.srcref.Api.srcrefUrl
import io.kotest.core.spec.style.StringSpec
import io.kotest.matchers.string.shouldContain
import io.kotest.matchers.string.shouldNotContain
import io.kotest.matchers.string.shouldStartWith

class ApiTest :
  StringSpec(
    {
      "srcrefUrl with default parameters" {
        val url =
          srcrefUrl(
            account = "user",
            repo = "repo",
            path = "src/Main.kt",
            beginRegex = "fun main",
          )
        url shouldStartWith "https://www.srcref.com/github?"
        url shouldContain "account=user"
        url shouldContain "repo=repo"
        url shouldContain "branch=master"
        url shouldContain "bregex="
      }

      "srcrefUrl with custom begin parameters" {
        val url =
          srcrefUrl(
            account = "user",
            repo = "repo",
            path = "file.kt",
            beginRegex = "pattern",
            beginOccurrence = 2,
            beginOffset = 3,
            beginTopDown = false,
          )
        url shouldContain "boccur=2"
        url shouldContain "boffset=3"
        url shouldContain "btopd=false"
      }

      "srcrefUrl includes end params when endRegex is non-empty" {
        val url =
          srcrefUrl(
            account = "user",
            repo = "repo",
            path = "file.kt",
            beginRegex = "begin",
            endRegex = "end",
            endOccurrence = 2,
            endOffset = 1,
            endTopDown = false,
          )
        url shouldContain "eregex="
        url shouldContain "eoccur=2"
        url shouldContain "eoffset=1"
        url shouldContain "etopd=false"
      }

      "srcrefUrl omits end params when endRegex is empty" {
        val url =
          srcrefUrl(
            account = "user",
            repo = "repo",
            path = "file.kt",
            beginRegex = "pattern",
            endRegex = "",
          )
        url shouldNotContain "eregex"
        url shouldNotContain "eoccur"
        url shouldNotContain "eoffset"
        url shouldNotContain "etopd"
      }

      "srcrefUrl applies HTML4 escaping" {
        val url =
          srcrefUrl(
            account = "user",
            repo = "repo",
            path = "file.kt",
            beginRegex = "pattern",
            escapeHtml4 = true,
          )
        url shouldContain "&"
      }

      "srcrefUrl uses custom prefix and branch" {
        val url =
          srcrefUrl(
            account = "user",
            repo = "repo",
            path = "file.kt",
            beginRegex = "pattern",
            prefix = "https://custom.com",
            branch = "develop",
          )
        url shouldStartWith "https://custom.com/github?"
        url shouldContain "branch=develop"
      }

      "srcrefUrl URL-encodes regex special characters" {
        val url =
          srcrefUrl(
            account = "user",
            repo = "repo",
            path = "file.kt",
            beginRegex = "foo\\(bar\\)",
          )
        url shouldContain "bregex="
        // The backslashes and parens should be URL-encoded, not literal
        url shouldNotContain "bregex=foo\\(bar\\)"
      }
    },
  )
